microsoft_ft: Led **0→1 product definition** of Azure's internal Resilience Automation Platform, shaping abstractions, self-service scheduling, and APIs that turned a 2-person ops function into a **platformized system** sustaining 45+ annual drills.

Designed and shipped an **internal AI agent** for drill planning, integrating LLM-powered copilots into the workflow to cut planning cycle time by **39%** and grow drill capacity **21%** without added headcount.

Defined **evaluation frameworks and feedback systems** so partner teams could measure recovery quality, prioritize fixes, and systematically improve resilience posture across 14 cross-org executions under executive visibility.

Directed a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, serving as bridge lead and translating ambiguous customer requirements into reusable, packaged validation workflows.

Engineered a **Power BI evaluation dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership actionable signals to target automation gaps and prioritize the highest-impact platform investments.

Drove cross-functional alignment to ship **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by **25%** and tightening the build→test→release loop for fleet-wide robotics software updates.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversion **2.7%** by executing a digital-first GTM strategy, optimizing the website, Google profile, and paid acquisition based on weekly performance reviews.
